tools.name: geo_scan
tools.description: Checks whether a website is readable and citable by AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews). Returns a 0-100 score across checks like llms.txt, Schema.org structured data, AI bots in robots.txt, content freshness, and heading structure — each with a concrete fix. Use whenever s

tools.name: local_business_check
tools.description: Checks a website for LocalBusiness Schema.org markup: required fields for Google Rich Results (name, image, address), recommended fields (telephone, opening hours, price range, geo coordinates, ratings), and type-correctness of nested properties (e.g. address must be a PostalAddress). Use whenever s
